title: Project Tick Release Components Manifest
description: Describes the canonical component versions shipped in a snapshot release. The release_tag is an opaque identifier (e.g. v202604102316); each component carries its own semver version for update comparison.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for this format.

release_tag.description: The Git tag / GitHub release tag (e.g. v202604102316). Opaque identifier, NOT a version.

components.description: Map of component-id to component metadata.

version.description: Canonical semver for this component. Used for update comparison.
